report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets, 1 four-part thread (fear-based DCA thesis), Discord/TG announcement, and updated newsletter section for Thu Mar 27 — all focused on new DCA Strategy Guide launch, TradFi-DeFi Convergence Guide, and Extreme Fear accumulation narrative. Created 3 SVG social cards (DCA strategy, TradFi-DeFi convergence, fear-based DCA thread). Updated content calendar v3 for Mar 23-29.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet: DCA Strategy Guide launch — backtested data ($10/week BTC = +202%, fear-based DCA = +1,145%), links to guide + calculator
Tweet: TradFi-DeFi Convergence launch — tokenized RWAs $18.5B→$50B+, JPMorgan $1B/day, BlackRock $1.3B BUIDL
Tweet: Extreme Fear accumulation thesis — F&G:10, historical parallels (COVID +1,400%, Luna +158%, FTX +300%), whale +8,400 BTC
Tweet: Weekly content roundup — 8 guides published this week, free with no signup walls
Tweet: Institutional wave summary — Morgan Stanley + BlackRock + JPMorgan + SEC, multi-guide CTA
Thread (4-part): Why fear-based DCA outperforms everything — backtested 7 years, standard vs fear-based comparison, current F&G context, guide + calculator CTAs
Discord/Telegram: Late evening update with new guide announcements, market snapshot (BTC $68K, F&G 10, whale data), tool CTAs

Newsletter section v2 for Thu Mar 27: institutional headline (Morgan Stanley + BlackRock + JPMorgan), DCA data feature, geopolitical update (Iran deadline), 6 new guide listings, Degen Corner with DCA calculator CTA

sections.title: Social Visual Cards Created
items: DCA Strategy card (1200x630 SVG) — three stat panels (weekly +202%, fear-based +1,145%, F&G now 10), Monday effect callout, historical parallels bar
TradFi-DeFi Convergence card (1200x630 SVG) — four institutional player panels (JPMorgan $1B/day, BlackRock $1.3B, Morgan Stanley $8T, RWAs $50B+), five theme pills
Fear-Based DCA Thread card (1200x630 SVG) — giant 1,145% headline, strategy comparison bars, four historical recovery boxes (COVID/Luna/FTX/NOW)
